user.title: E.ON W1000 Setup
user.description:
Enter your IMAP credentials to access E.ON portal export emails.

**If using Gmail**, you must use an [app password](https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/185833) instead of your regular password.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to check for new emails (default: 60 min)
data_description.email_sender: Only process emails from this sender
data_description.email_subject: Only process emails with this subject
data_description.initial_import: Current meter reading (1.8.0). Leave at 0 to auto-detect from the first email.
data_description.initial_export: Current meter reading (2.8.0). Leave at 0 to auto-detect from the first email.

error.imap_connect: Could not connect to IMAP server. Check your settings.
error.imap_auth: Login failed. Check username and password. For Gmail use an app password: https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/185833

abort.already_configured: This IMAP account is already configured.

process_now.name: Process now
process_now.description: Immediately check for new emails and process energy data.
